roadmap.milestone: M3 — ODRL contract negotiation between agents, attached to pod resources
roadmap.note: The ODRL usage-control EXPRESSION + client-side EVALUATION library: build an ODRL 2.2 Policy/Permission/Prohibition/Duty graph (real W3C vocab http://www.w3.org/ns/odrl/2/), serialise/parse (Turtle/JSON-LD), and evaluate a request context (agent/action/target/constraints) to permit/deny/duty — pure, deterministic, testable, with ODRL conflict resolution + constraint satisfaction. Composes with M1 (a policy can reference an @jeswr/solid-agent-card AgentDescriptor) and M2 (a policy can gate an @jeswr/solid-a2a A2A action). SEPARATE-CODEBASE — zero prod-solid-server core risk (pure client-side library; no networking, no server change). The M3 negotiation state machine + Agreement signer + revocation-notify (@jeswr/agent-odrl) build ON this expression/evaluation layer; the SERVER-SIDE pod-side ODRL authorizer beside WAC (M5a) is CORE-PSS and is NOT built here (flagged for maintainer approval).
